description: Began initial development and register mapping for the Realtek RTL8111 Ethernet driver.
Implemented core paging structures and virtual memory management subsystem.
The ValiantCore keyboard driver feature has arrived; `keyboard.c` is now in the repository.
The ValiantCore Aarch64 UART file is in the repository; the ValiantCore Aarch64 display is now available as well.
ValiantCore Aarch64: All init services are being started; kernel_main64.c is in the repository.
